series_metadata.series_title: Underground Storage Tank (UST) Installer Training Certification
series_metadata.series_description: Files contain information on COM5170 (Application for Underground Storage Tank Installer Certification). The application file also contains several other miscellaneous documents such as lesson plans and instructor resumes.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Microform: four years ; Electronic: four years ; Paper: four years
retention_rules.disposition_method: Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
